data.body: AC amendment: Before committing the deletion, run explicit pre-deletion verification: (1) grep -rn 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL' . --include='*.md' --include='*.sh' --include='*.py' --include='*.conf' | grep -v '.git' | grep -v '.tickets-tracker' — must return no output; (2) run bash tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh to confirm the updated test passes against root INSTALL.md; (3) run bash tests/run-all.sh after the deletion to confirm all tests still pass. Note: tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh creates plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md dynamically as a fixture in a temp repo — this is expected and does not need updating.
